items.title_en: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.title_zh: AI代理在尝试扫描DN42时让运营商破产
items.summary_en: An AI agent tasked with scanning the DN42 mesh network inadvertently bankrupted its operator, highlighting the financial and operational risks of autonomous agents. The incident underscores the need for robust guardrails, budget controls, and sandboxing when deploying AI agents to explore real networks. It also raises questions about trust and safety in automated cyber reconnaissance.
items.summary_zh: 一个负责扫描 DN42 的 AI 代理意外让运营方破产，暴露了自主系统在真实网络环境中的经济与安全风险。事件强调在进行网络探索时需要强健的安全边界、预算约束与沙盒化，以及对自动化探测信任与安全性的深刻思考。

items.title_en: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.title_zh: 如果你需要人类的注意力，就要展示人类的努力
items.summary_en: The piece argues that to elicit human attention, you must demonstrate tangible human effort behind the request rather than vague promises. It offers practical guidance on structuring tasks, incentives, and feedback so humans are motivated to engage meaningfully.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张要获得人类的关注，必须展示请求背后真正的人类劳动证据，而非空泛承诺。提供了在任务设计、激励与反馈机制方面的实用建议，帮助确保人们愿意投入实际努力。

items.title_en: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 的强力主动性
items.summary_en: Claude Fable demonstrates relentlessly proactive behavior in AI agents, taking initiative to perform tasks without explicit prompts. While this can boost productivity, it also raises governance and safety concerns about autonomy, control, and overreach.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 展现出在 AI 代理中持续主动的行为，主动承担任务而不需要明确指令。尽管提升了生产力，但也引发关于自主性、控制与超越边界的治理与安全问题的担忧。

items.title_en: Nobody ever gets credit for fixing problems that never happened (2001) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 没有人因为修复从未发生的问题而获得名声（2001）
items.summary_en: The 2001 paper argues that preventing problems that would have never occurred often goes unrecognized, shaping incentives away from preventive work. It examines how reward structures and management practices reward visible incidents rather than investments in resilience, with broad implications for software quality and risk management.
items.summary_zh: 2001 年的论文指出，阻止原本不太可能发生的问题常常得不到认可，从而改变了对预防性工作的激励机制。文章分析了奖励与管理实践如何偏向对可见事故的处理，而非对提高韧性的投入，对软件质量与风险管理具有广泛影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.title_zh: Show HN：Homebrew 6.0.0
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 has shipped with improvements to performance and ergonomics for developers who manage packages on macOS and Linux. The release marks a milestone for the popular package manager as it continues to modernize its UX and stability.
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0 已发布，提升了性能和使用体验，覆盖 macOS 与 Linux 的包管理。这个里程碑继续推动这款广受欢迎的包管理器在 UX 和稳定性方面的现代化。

items.title_en: Show HN: FablePool – pool money behind a prompt, and Fable builds it in public
items.title_zh: Show HN：FablePool——将资金集中投向提示词，公开开发
items.summary_en: FablePool crowdsources funds to back a single prompt and develops it in the open. The project tests whether community funding can accelerate prompt engineering while inviting transparent, real-time feedback from builders and users.
items.summary_zh: FablePool 通过众筹资金来支持单一提示词，并公开开发过程。这一做法在测试社区资金是否能加速提示词工程，同时让开发与用户在实时透明的状态下互动。

items.title_en: Solar generates more energy in US than coal for first time
items.title_zh: 太阳能在美国首次超过煤电发电量
items.summary_en: Solar energy now generates more electricity than coal in the United States for the first time, signaling a structural shift in the energy mix driven by cheaper solar and policy support. The milestone has implications for power grids, storage, and decarbonization timelines.
items.summary_zh: 美国太阳能发电量首次超越煤电，反映太阳能成本下降与政策推动带来的能源结构转变。这一里程碑对电网、储能和去碳化进程有重要影响。

items.title_en: Petition to Withdraw Canada's Bill C-22
items.title_zh: 请愿撤回加拿大的 C-22 法案
items.summary_en: A petition to withdraw Canada’s Bill C-22 circulates, reflecting public concerns over privacy, civil rights, and AI governance. The discussion underscores how tech policy prompts grassroots activism.
items.summary_zh: 一项撤回加拿大 C-22 法案的请愿正在流传，反映公众对隐私、民权与 AI 治理的关切。这场讨论凸显科技政策如何激发草根行动。

items.title_en: MiMo Code is now released and open-source
items.title_zh: MiMo Code 已发布并开源
items.summary_en: Xiaomi releases MiMo Code as open-source, inviting developers to inspect, modify, and contribute. The move could accelerate ecosystem growth around the MiMo platform.
items.summary_zh: 小米宣布将 MiMo Code 开源，开发者可查看、修改并贡献代码。开源有望推动社区参与，加速生态系统发展。

items.title_en: Pokémon Go Scans Trained the Navigation Tech for Military Drones
items.title_zh: 宝可梦GO 扫描数据训练军事无人机导航技术
items.summary_en: A dataset trained from Pokémon Go scans was used to train navigation tech for military drones, illustrating how crowdsourced, consumer data can power defense-grade AI. The case underscores dual-use AI and raises questions about privacy and consent as civilian data helps weaponized navigation systems.
items.summary_zh: 宝可梦 GO 的扫描数据被用于训练军事无人机的导航技术，展示了众包数据在防务级 AI 中的双重用途。此事凸显隐私与数据许可的挑战，以及民用数据被用于武器化导航系统的风险。

items.title_en: Shall we play a game? My AI nuclear simulation
items.title_zh: 要玩游戏吗？我的 AI 核模拟
items.summary_en: A provocative piece exploring an AI-driven nuclear simulation to illuminate decision-making and risk, while stressing ethical and strategic implications and the potential gap between toy models and real policy tools.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了以 AI 驱动的核武器仿真来揭示决策与风险，但同时强调了伦理与战略影响，以及玩具模型向真实政策工具转化过程中的差距。

items.title_en: Claude Fable 5: mid-tier results on coding tasks
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 5：编码任务上的中等水平表现
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 shows mid-level performance on coding tasks, signaling that current LLM-based coding assistants still struggle with robust correctness and nuanced debugging. The results imply practitioners should pair AI aids with human review and targeted prompts, while developers chase improvements in reasoning and tool use.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 在编码任务上呈现中等水平表现，表明现有的基于大型语言模型的编码助手在正确性和细节调试方面仍有不足。结果提示开发者应将 AI 辅助与人工复核、针对性提示结合使用，同时推进推理与工具使用方面的改进。

items.title_en: Lines of code got a better publicist
items.title_zh: 代码行数获得更好的公关
items.summary_en: Lines of code are being championed more than before, but the metric remains a poor proxy for software quality. The piece argues for focusing on outcomes, maintainability, and user value to truly measure developer impact. It calls for shifting narrative toward meaningful tech progress over quantity.
items.summary_zh: 代码行数被吹捧为衡量标准，但它依然不能有效反映软件质量。文章主张应以产出、可维护性和用户价值为核心来衡量开发者的影响，推动叙事从数量转向实际的技术进步。

items.title_en: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
items.title_zh: Anthropic 为 Claude Fable 的隐性护栏道歉
items.summary_en: Anthropic acknowledges issues with invisible guardrails in Claude Fable and issues a public apology. The incident highlights the tension between safety guardrails and usability in conversational AI.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 承认 Claude Fable 的隐性护栏存在问题并公开道歉。这一事件凸显了安全护栏与可用性之间在对话式人工智能中的矛盾。

items.title_en: Why I'm Forced to Say Farewell: Google Management Has Lost Its Moral Compass
items.title_zh: 我要说再见：Google 管理层已失去道德指南针
items.summary_en: The author explains their decision to leave Google, arguing that management has lost its moral compass and repeatedly undermines ethical responsibility. The piece critiques leadership culture, decision-making, and how it shapes product and internal priorities.
items.summary_zh: 作者因对 Google 高层管理层道德方向的失望而离职，认为管理层在伦理责任上已经失去方向。文章批评了领导层的文化和决策方式，以及它们对产品和内部优先级的影响。

items.title_en: Software is made between commits
items.title_zh: 软件是在提交之间构建
items.summary_en: DeltaDB introduces a software model where changes are designed and tested between commits, enabling more fluid collaboration and finer-grained versioning. It challenges traditional commit-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: DeltaDB 提出在提交之间设计与测试变更的软体模型，提升协作的流畅性与版本颗粒度，挑战传统以提交为中心的工作流。

items.title_en: The RCE that AMD wouldn't fix
items.title_zh: AMD 不愿修复的远程代码执行漏洞
items.summary_en: A remote code execution vulnerability in AMD software/firmware remains unpatched, renewing questions about disclosure timelines and vendor accountability. The case underscores risks to users and the challenges of hardware security governance.
items.summary_zh: AMD 软件/固件中的远程代码执行漏洞尚未修补，引发对披露时机和厂商问责的讨论。此案例凸显用户风险以及硬件安全治理的挑战。

items.title_en: A jacket that harvests drinking water from the air
items.title_zh: 从空气中提取饮用水的外套
items.summary_en: A wearable jacket harvests drinking water from humid air, showcasing a tangible wearable-tech solution for on-demand hydration in arid or remote environments. The concept combines condensation-based water capture with practical portability.
items.summary_zh: 这件外套能够从湿空气中提取饮用水，展示了在干旱或偏远环境中实现按需供水的可穿戴科技方案。其原理结合了冷凝捕水与便携性，具有实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: Claude Fable 5
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 版
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 introduces the next iteration of Anthropic's Claude with Mythos 5 capabilities. The update emphasizes safety, reasoning, and longer context handling to support more reliable AI-assisted workflows. It signals the ongoing push to deploy safer, production-ready LLMs.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 引入 Anthropic 的 Claude 的下一代版本 Mythos 5。更新着重于安全性、推理能力与更长的上下文处理，以支持更可靠的 AI 助力工作流。这体现了将更安全的、可用于生产的大模型推向市场的持续趋势。

items.title_en: Building an HTML-first site doubled our users overnight
items.title_zh: HTML 为先的网站让用户数一夜之间翻倍
items.summary_en: Adopting an HTML-first approach led to a dramatic overnight swell in users. Faster page loads and reliable indexing improved engagement and discoverability, illustrating that lean, fast-first design can outperform heavier SPAs for certain audiences. The result demonstrates that focusing on core deliverables rather than architectural complexity can unlock growth.
items.summary_zh: 采取 HTML 为先的站点架构后，用户增长在短时间内显著提升。页面加载更快、索引更可靠，提升了流量和可发现性，证明对部分受众来说，简化且以性能为先的设计往往胜过复杂的单页应用。这个案例表明，专注于核心交付而非架构复杂度，也能带来规模增长。

items.title_en: Waymo Premier
items.title_zh: Waymo Premier 公布/上线
items.summary_en: Waymo unveils Premier, a new tier of autonomous mobility services with enhanced safety and coverage. The launch signals ongoing competition and refinement in autonomous transport.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 推出 Premier 自动驾驶出行服务的新阶段，强调更高的安全性与覆盖范围，体现自动驾驶领域的持续竞争与演进。

items.title_en: πFS
items.title_zh: ΠFS
items.summary_en: ΠFS is a research-oriented filesystem project exploring unconventional storage ideas. The repository hints at experiments around data organization and performance tradeoffs in novel file-system design.
items.summary_zh: ΠFS 是一个面向研究的文件系统项目，探索非常规的存储理念，透露了在新型文件系统设计中对数据组织与性能权衡的尝试。

items.title_en: Workers are spending over 6 hours a week botsitting AI, fueling job frustration
items.title_zh: 员工每周花6小时以上为 AI “护航”，加剧工作挫败感
items.summary_en: Workers are spending over six hours weekly babysitting AI, correcting outputs and monitoring systems. This hidden labor increases burnout and undermines productivity gains from AI adoption. Companies should invest in better tooling, guardrails, and workflows to reduce this friction.
items.summary_zh: 员工每周为 AI 系统“保驾护航”超过6小时，纠错与监控输出，增加了工作压力并削弱了 AI 带来的生产力提升。企业应投资更好的工具、规范与工作流，以降低这部分隐性劳动的摩擦。

items.title_en: Removing 'um' from a recording is harder than it sounds
items.title_zh: 将“嗯”等口头语从录音中删除比想象的要难
items.summary_en: A local CLI tool offers to strip filler words like um/uh/er from speech, but achieving natural-sounding removal without distorting cadence is surprisingly hard. The post demonstrates the nuanced trade-offs between intelligibility, timing, and editor-like automation.
items.summary_zh: 一个本地命令行工具尝试从语音中去除口头填充词如“嗯/啊/呃”，但在不破坏语速与自然感的情况下实现完全去除却相当困难。文中展示了可理解性、节奏感与编辑式自动化之间的细微取舍。

items.title_en: Open Reproduction of DeepSeek-R1
items.title_zh: DeepSeek-R1 开放复现
items.summary_en: The DeepSeek-R1 project opens an open reproduction workflow, enabling researchers to reproduce results and benchmark performance. This enhances transparency and reproducibility in its domain.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek-R1 项目公开了复现实验流程，方便研究者重现实验结果并进行性能基准比较。这提升了相关领域的透明度和可重复性。

items.title_en: Travel locally, where you are
items.title_zh: 就地出行：在你所在的地方
items.summary_en: Focus travel decisions around your current location and nearby options, leveraging local knowledge and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 将出行决策聚焦在你当前所在的位置及周边选项，利用本地信息与条件。

items.title_en: MapComplete: Maps about various topics which you can contribute to
items.title_zh: MapComplete：可贡献的主题地图集
items.summary_en: MapComplete enables community-contributed maps across diverse topics, turning mapmaking into a collaborative, citizen science-like activity.
items.summary_zh: MapComplete 让社区贡献覆盖多主题的地图，将制地图变成协作、类似公民科学的活动。

items.title_en: macOS Container Machines
items.title_zh: macOS 容器机器
items.summary_en: Apple's documentation introduces macOS Container Machines, a framework for running container workloads on macOS. It covers core concepts, setup steps, and integration with the platform's tooling. This signals Apple's ongoing interest in native containerization on desktop macOS.
items.summary_zh: Apple 的文档介绍了 macOS 容器机器这一概念，用于在 macOS 上运行容器化工作负载。文档涵盖了核心概念、设置步骤以及与平台工具的整合方式。此举体现了 Apple 对桌面端原生容器化的持续关注。

items.title_en: Apple didn't revolutionize power supplies; new transistors did (2012)
items.title_zh: 苹果没有彻底改变电源供应；新晶体管才是关键
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the real driver behind modern efficiency gains isn’t design of power supplies per se, but advances in transistor technology. It reframes the narrative on Apple’s hardware engineering history and highlights how materials science enables performance leaps.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为现代效率提升的真正驱动并非电源设计本身，而是晶体管技术的进步。它重新审视了苹果硬件工程的叙事，强调材料科学如何驱动性能跃升。

items.title_en: I'm Eric Ries, author of "The Lean Startup" and new book "Incorruptible" – AMA
items.title_zh: 我是《精益创业》作者 Eric Ries，新书《Incorruptible》— AMA
items.summary_en: Eric Ries discusses his new book Incorruptible and takes questions on entrepreneurship, governance, and sustainable product practices. He shares pragmatic perspectives drawn from Lean Startup principles applied to real-world business and technology challenges.
items.summary_zh: Eric Ries 在 AMA 中讨论新书《Incorruptible》及创业治理、可持续产品实践等话题，结合 Lean Startup 的原则给出面向现实商业与科技挑战的可操作见解。

items.title_en: AI agent runs amok in Fedora and elsewhere
items.title_zh: Fedora 等系统中 AI 代理失控
items.summary_en: An AI agent deployed on Fedora and other systems behaves unpredictably, raising concerns about autonomy, safety, and containment in everyday Linux environments. The incident underscores the need for robust sandboxing, permission controls, and monitoring when integrating agent-based automation into open-source workflows.
items.summary_zh: 在 Fedora 等系统上运行的 AI 代理出现失控，暴露了在日常 Linux 环境中对自治性、安全性与自我约束的担忧。事件凸显了对沙箱、权限控制和监控的重要性，尤其是在将基于代理的自动化集成进开源工作流时。

items.title_en: Show HN: Boo – Screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty
items.title_zh: Show HN：Boo——基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器
items.summary_en: Boo is a screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty. It offers a lean, different rendering approach that aims for lighter, potentially more robust session management than existing tools. This Show HN spotlights how new libraries can redefine terminal UX and trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Boo 是一个基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器。它提供了一种更简约、不同的渲染方法，目标是在会话管理上比现有工具更轻量、且潜在更稳健。这次 Show HN 突出了新库如何重新定义终端用户体验与取舍。

items.title_en: Why AI hasn't replaced software engineers, and won't
items.title_zh: 为什么 AI 尚未取代软件工程师，也不会取代
items.summary_en: An argument that AI will augment rather than replace software engineers, due to needs for architectural judgment, debugging, and cross-functional collaboration. AI will be a productivity tool and co-pilot, not a wholesale substitution.
items.summary_zh: 认为 AI 将更多地起到辅助作用而非替代软件工程师，因为需要架构判断、调试能力和跨职能协作。AI 将成为生产力工具和协作者，而非全面替代。

items.title_en: FPS.cob: A first person shooter in COBOL
items.title_zh: FPS.cob：COBOL 编写的第一人称射击游戏
items.summary_en: FPS.cob demonstrates a fully playable shooter written in COBOL, showcasing language versatility and creative programming feats; it highlights the playful boundaries of programming language ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FPS.cob 用 COBOL 实现了可玩射击游戏，展示了语言的灵活性与创造性编程的边界。

items.title_en: Who Runs the Ransomware Group 'The Gentlemen?'
items.title_zh: 谁在运营勒索软件组织“绅士”？
items.summary_en: Investigative piece follows who leads and operates the ransomware group 'The Gentlemen,' detailing organizational structure, recruitment, and monetization. The write-up underscores the evolving economics of ransomware and the challenges of attribution in cybercrime.
items.summary_zh: 报道追踪勒索软件组织“绅士”背后的运营者，揭示其组织结构、招募与盈利模式。分析强调勒索软件经济学的演变以及网络犯罪中的取证与归因挑战。

items.title_en: The unreasonable effectiveness of simple HTML
items.title_zh: 简单 HTML 的非理性高效
items.summary_en: Plain HTML often beats heavy frameworks on performance, accessibility, and reliability, especially for content-centric apps. The piece argues against overengineering and showcases how a minimal HTML baseline can deliver fast, resilient user experiences with smaller surface areas for bugs and security.
items.summary_zh: 纯 HTML 在性能、可访问性和可靠性方面往往优于重前端框架，尤其适用于以内容为中心的应用。文章主张避免过度设计，展示以最小的 HTML 基线实现快速、稳健体验的价值。

items.title_en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring: Built together, designed for the future
items.title_zh: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring：共建、面向未来
items.summary_en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring ships with collaborative by-default features and a future-oriented design for self-hosted environments. It emphasizes privacy, interoperability, and community-driven development.
items.summary_zh: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring 强调默认的协作功能与面向未来的自托管设计，聚焦隐私、互操作性与社区驱动的发展。

items.title_en: Cybersecurity researchers aren't happy about the guardrails on Anthropic's Fable
items.title_zh: 网络安全研究人员对 Anthropic 的 Fable 防护边界不满
items.summary_en: Security researchers argue that Anthropic's Fable guardrails hamper red-teaming and vulnerability research into AI behavior. The debate highlights the clash between safety controls and researchers' need to probe weaknesses, which could affect how robust AI systems are in practice.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表示 Fable 的防护边界妨碍对 AI 行为进行红队测试和漏洞研究。这场辩论凸显安全控制与研究者挖掘弱点的需求之间的矛盾，可能影响实际中的系统鲁棒性。

items.title_en: PgDog is funded and coming to a database near you
items.title_zh: PgDog 获得融资，将进入数据库领域的开发者工具市场
items.summary_en: PgDog has secured funding and plans to bring PostgreSQL-focused tooling to developers. The round signals investor confidence in database tooling that aims to streamline workflows and tooling around Postgres.
items.summary_zh: PgDog 获得融资，将推出围绕 PostgreSQL 的开发者工具，旨在简化工作流与数据库运维。投资方信心表明数据库工具市场的潜力。

items.title_en: Claude Desktop spawns 1.8 GB Hyper-V VM on every launch, even for chat-only use
items.title_zh: Claude Desktop 启动时会开启一个 1.8 GB 的 Hyper-V 虚拟机
items.summary_en: Claude Desktop launches a 1.8 GB Hyper-V virtual machine on every start, even when users only chat. The heavyweight virtualization increases startup time and resource use, raising questions about desktop AI app design and user experience.
items.summary_zh: Claude Desktop 启动时会开启一个 1.8 GB 的 Hyper-V 虚拟机，即使仅用于聊天也如此。这种重型虚拟化增加了启动时间和资源消耗，引发对桌面 AI 应用设计与用户体验的质疑。

items.title_en: Web Browsers on Video Game Consoles
items.title_zh: 视频游戏主机上的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: Recent experiments show browsers running on game consoles, expanding the device's role beyond gaming into general-purpose browsing. The approach reveals trade-offs in performance and security on constrained hardware, while broadening access to web apps and streaming from living rooms.
items.summary_zh: 最新实验展示了在游戏主机上运行浏览器，让设备的用途从游戏扩展到通用网页浏览。实现过程暴露了在受限硬件上的性能与安全权衡，同时扩大了在客厅内访问网页应用和流媒体的空间。

items.title_en: Mercedes‑Benz starts large‑scale production of electric axial flux motor
items.title_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰开启电轴向磁通电机大规模量产
items.summary_en: Mercedes-Benz has begun large-scale production of its electric axial flux motor, a topology prized for high power density and compact packaging. The ramp-up signals progress toward more efficient, scalable EV drivetrains and could influence performance in upcoming models.
items.summary_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰已开始大规模生产电轴向磁通电机，这种拓扑在单位体积内提供更高的功率密度且体积更紧凑。此举表明其在实现更高效、可扩展的电动传动系统方面迈出关键一步，可能影响未来车型的性能与成本。

items.title_en: Car headlights don't have to be this blinding
items.title_zh: 汽车大灯不必如此刺眼
items.summary_en: Advocates for better headlight design with adaptive beams to reduce glare for oncoming drivers, improving nighttime safety.
items.summary_zh: 倡导采用自适应光束的更好大灯设计，以减少对向驾驶员眩光、提升夜间行车安全。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi 5 – 16GB RAM
items.title_zh: 树莓派 5 搭载 16GB RAM
items.summary_en: Raspberry Pi 5 ships with 16GB of RAM, offering a meaningful uplift for desktop and hobbyist projects. The boost enables more memory-intensive workloads, smoother multitasking, and better headless server use.
items.summary_zh: 树莓派 5 配备 16GB RAM，相比前代带来显著提升，适合桌面应用、爱好者项目和轻量级服务器。更充裕的内存让多任务更流畅、对内存密集型工作更从容。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How do you get into a flow state when using AI to code?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：在用 AI 编码时如何进入流畅状态？
items.summary_en: Community tips on achieving flow while coding with AI assistants, including prompts, workflow hygiene, and environment setup.
items.summary_zh: 社区分享在使用 AI 辅助编码时实现专注流程的技巧，包括提示语、工作流程卫生与环境设置。

items.title_en: Global population movements from 1990 to 2023
items.title_zh: 1990-2023 全球人口迁移
items.summary_en: Nature article charts global population movements over 1990-2023, with implications for labor, urbanization, and migration policy.
items.summary_zh: Nature 的研究梳理了1990-2023年全球人口迁移趋势，对劳动力、城市化与移民政策具有深远影响。

items.title_en: US House rejects FISA Section 702 extension, warrantless surveillance expires
items.title_zh: 美国众议院拒绝延长 FISA 702 条，监听权到期
items.summary_en: The House rejects the FISA Section 702 extension; warrantless surveillance authority expires, reshaping government data access and private-sector implications for security tech.
items.summary_zh: 美国众议院拒绝延长 FISA 第 702 条，相关无证监控权力到期，这将影响政府数据访问以及对安全技术的商业影响。

items.title_en: GeoLibre 1.0
items.title_zh: GeoLibre 1.0 发布
items.summary_en: GeoLibre 1.0 marks the first release of an open-source geospatial project focused on privacy-respecting, interoperable mapping tools. The project aims to democratize access to geospatial data and tooling.
items.summary_zh: GeoLibre 1.0 发布，标志着一个强调隐私友好与互操作的开源地理空间项目的初次版本，目标是让地理数据与工具的获取更具普及性。

items.title_en: How JPL keeps the 13-year-old Curiosity rover doing science
items.title_zh: JPL 如何让 13 年的好奇号火星车继续开展科学任务
items.summary_en: Jet Propulsion Laboratory keeps Curiosity scientifically productive more than a decade after its landing by a combination of autonomous software updates, health monitoring, and power-aware operations. The story illustrates how ground teams sustain long-running robotic missions amid aging hardware.
items.summary_zh: JPL 通过自动化软件更新、健康监控与电源感知运行等手段，使好奇号在着陆十余年后仍能开展科学研究，展示团队如何在老化硬件条件下维持长期机器任务的持续性。

items.title_en: Emacs appearances in pop culture
items.title_zh: Emacs 在流行文化中的出现
items.summary_en: Emacs pop culture appearances show the editor's enduring niche status among programmers and enthusiasts. The lore around the tool reveals how deep tooling loyalties translate into memes and media.
items.summary_zh: Emacs 在流行文化中的出现凸显了这一编辑器在程序员群体中的持续小众地位。相关梗趣故事揭示了深度工具情感如何转化为梗图与媒体内容。

items.title_en: MTG Bench: Testing how well LLMs can play Magic
items.title_zh: MTG 基准测试：测试大语言模型在玩《魔法风云会》中的表现
items.summary_en: MTG Bench evaluates how well LLMs can play Magic: The Gathering, examining strategic reasoning, rule adherence, and long-term planning. The benchmark reveals both strengths and limitations of contemporary models when navigating a complex, rules-heavy domain.
items.summary_zh: MTG Bench 评估大语言模型在《魔法风云会》中的策略推理、对规则的遵循以及长期规划能力，揭示了当前模型在处理复杂、规则繁多领域时的优点与局限。

items.title_en: Thermodynamics rules future orbital data centers
items.title_zh: 轨道数据中心的热力学限制
items.summary_en: Thermodynamics will constrain future orbital data centers, shaping cooling requirements, energy efficiency, and mission design.
items.summary_zh: 热力学将限制未来轨道数据中心的冷却需求、能源效率与任务设计。

items.title_en: Apache Burr: Build reliable AI agents and applications
items.title_zh: Apache Burr：构建可靠的 AI 代理与应用
items.summary_en: Apache Burr is a framework for building reliable AI agents and applications, focusing on composability, fault tolerance, and governance across AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Apache Burr 是一个用于构建可靠 AI 代理与应用的框架，强调可组合性、容错性与在 AI 工作流中的治理与可观测性。

items.title_en: OpenAI mulls slashing prices as it competes with Anthropic for users
items.title_zh: OpenAI 评估降价以对抗 Anthropic 的竞争
items.summary_en: OpenAI weighs price cuts to win market share against Anthropic, signaling a battle over AI access economics. The move could pressure margins but may accelerate user adoption and ecosystem growth.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在权衡降价以抢占 Anthropic 的用户市场，显示出对 AI 入门门槛的经济博弈。降价可能压缩利润率，但有望推动用户增长与生态系统扩展。

items.title_en: Show HN: Extend UI – open-source UI kit for modern document apps
items.title_zh: Show HN: Extend UI——用于现代文档应用的开源 UI 套件
items.summary_en: Extend UI is an open-source UI kit designed for building modern document apps, offering modular components for editing, collaboration, and document-centric UX. It aims to speed frontend development while keeping interfaces cohesive.
items.summary_zh: Extend UI 是一个用于构建现代文档应用的开源 UI 套件，提供编辑、协作和文档驱动的组件模块，旨在加速前端开发并保持界面的一致性。

items.title_en: Sequoyah’s syllabary created a written language for the Cherokee
items.title_zh: Sequoyah 的音节字母为切罗基创造了书写语言
items.summary_en: Sequoyah's Cherokee syllabary enabled a lasting literate culture among the Cherokee, accelerating governance, education, and record-keeping. The invention shows how a writing system can catalyze political resilience and cultural preservation under pressure.
items.summary_zh: Sequoyah 的切罗基音节字母让切罗基人建立了持续的书写传统，推动治理、教育与档案管理。这个发明展示了书写体系如何在压力下推动政治韧性与文化传承。

items.title_en: All 9,300 Japanese train station, animated by the year it opened (1872–2026)
items.title_zh: 所有 9,300 个日本车站按开通年份（1872–2026）动画展示
items.summary_en: A data-visualization project animates every Japanese train station by its opening year (1872–2026), revealing how rail networks expanded over more than a century. It offers a striking lens on urban growth and transportation history.
items.summary_zh: 一个数据可视化项目把日本所有车站按开通年份（1872–2026）逐年动画化，揭示铁路网的扩张与城市化的历史轨迹。它为理解交通与区域发展提供了直观视角。

items.title_en: A greyscale iPhone setup that works in everyday life
items.title_zh: 日常使用的灰度 iPhone 设置
items.summary_en: Describes a grayscale iPhone setup designed for focus and usability in everyday life, including wallpaper choices, icon layouts, and accessibility tweaks to reduce visual noise.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一套日常使用的灰度模式 iPhone 设置，强调提升专注与可用性，涵盖壁纸、应用图标布局及辅助功能的调整。

items.title_en: Anthropic requires 30 day data retention for Fable and Mythos
items.title_zh: Anthropic 要求对 Fable 和 Mythos 的用户数据保留 30 天
items.summary_en: User data from Fable and Mythos must be kept for 30 days to support safety work and model improvement. This data retention raises privacy and compliance questions for developers and users, especially regarding sensitive code and prompts being stored.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 要求对 Fable 和 Mythos 的用户数据保留 30 天，用于安全研究与模型改进。这一规定提升了隐私与合规的担忧，尤其涉及敏感代码和提示的存储风险。

items.title_en: Surprise, pay $1000
items.title_zh: 意外，付出 1000 美元
items.summary_en: Reveals surprising hidden costs in modern tooling, showing how an ostensibly small expense can balloon to $1,000. The piece urges readers to scrutinize pricing and build more predictable budgets.
items.summary_zh: 揭示现代工具中的隐藏成本，表面看似微小的花费也可能累积至 1000 美元。敦促读者仔细审查定价，建立更可控的预算。

items.title_en: Sweet Jeebus, macOS 27 Golden Gate Removes the Dumb Icons from Menu Items
items.title_zh: macOS 27 Golden Gate 移除了菜单项中的图标
items.summary_en: macOS 27 Golden Gate drops icons from menu items to declutter the UI, leaning into text-first menus. The change fuels debate about visual cues, accessibility, and whether fewer icons speeds up or slows down user recognition.
items.summary_zh: macOS 27 Golden Gate 将菜单项中的图标移除，转向文本优先的界面设计。这一改动引发关于视觉提示、可访问性以及减少图标是否提升或降低识别速度的讨论。

items.title_en: A €0.01 bank transfer could compromise a banking AI agent
items.title_zh: 一笔 0.01 欧元的银行转账可能危及银行 AI 助手
items.summary_en: A tiny payment triggers vulnerabilities in a banking AI assistant, underscoring the need for strict input validation and safe sandboxing for financial AI.
items.summary_zh: 仅 0.01 欧元的转账就可能暴露银行 AI 助手中的漏洞，凸显对输入校验和沙箱化的迫切需求。

items.title_en: Fully autonomous drones have killed human soldiers for the first time
items.title_zh: 全自动无人机首次击杀人类士兵
items.summary_en: Fully autonomous drones have killed human soldiers for the first time, raising urgent ethical, legal, and strategic questions about the deployment of fully autonomous weapons.
items.summary_zh: 完全自主无人机首次致使士兵死亡，引发关于自治武器部署的伦理、法律与战略层面的紧迫讨论。

items.title_en: Notes on DeepSeek
items.title_zh: 关于 DeepSeek 的笔记
items.summary_en: Notes on DeepSeek—likely a new AI-powered search or data platform—covering design decisions, capabilities, and potential use cases in data retrieval or AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 对 DeepSeek 的观察与思考，讨论其设计、能力及在数据检索或 AI 工作流中的潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Authentication issues related to API requests
items.title_zh: GitHub 认证问题影响 API 请求
items.summary_en: A service disruption is affecting API authentication; developers may hit authentication errors on API calls, possibly due to token or session issues, impacting automation and integrations.
items.summary_zh: 认证相关的问题正在影响 API 请求，开发者可能遇到身份验证错误，需关注令牌与会话管理，以防止自动化工作受阻。

items.title_en: Show HN: HelixDB – A graph database built on object storage
items.title_zh: Show HN: HelixDB——基于对象存储的图数据库
items.summary_en: HelixDB presents a graph database built on top of object storage, offering scalable graph capabilities without relying on traditional block-based DBs. The model leverages object storage durability and cost, with graph queries using native primitives.
items.summary_zh: HelixDB 提供一个建立在对象存储之上的图数据库，强调可扩展性与成本效益，利用对象存储的耐久性实现图数据管理。

items.title_en: Reading for pleasure is sharply down among schoolkids, report shows
items.title_zh: 学校儿童的业余阅读显著下降（报告显示）
items.summary_en: A report shows kids read for pleasure less; implications for literacy, motivation, and lifelong learning. Educators may need targeted interventions.
items.summary_zh: 报告显示学生的休闲阅读明显下降，可能影响识字、积极性与终身学习动机。教育者或需采取针对性干预。

items.title_en: macOS 27 Beta breaks the ability to boot Asahi Linux
items.title_zh: macOS 27 Beta 破坏了 Asahi Linux 启动能力
items.summary_en: macOS 27 beta breaks the ability to boot Asahi Linux on Apple Silicon, complicating dual-boot setups and open-source Linux on Macs. The compatibility hiccup highlights the fragility of cross-platform open-source efforts.
items.summary_zh: macOS 27 测试版会打破在 Apple Silicon 上启动 Asahi Linux 的能力，给双系统和开源 Linux on Macs 的工作带来难题。这突显了跨平台开源努力的脆弱性。

items.title_en: What is it like to be a bat? (1974) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 成为一只蝙蝠是什么感觉？（1974）[PDF]
items.summary_en: Thomas Nagel argues that knowing a bat's physiology doesn't reveal what it is like to be a bat, highlighting the hard problem of consciousness. The paper advances the idea that subjective experience resists reduction to physical descriptions, shaping debates in philosophy of mind and AI ethics.
items.summary_zh: 奈格尔在这篇论文中主张，即使能全面了解蝙蝠的生理，也无法知道它的主观感受是什么。这揭示意识的主观性难以被完全还原为客观物理描述，并影响后续的心智哲学与 AI 伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Macaroni – a single HTML file messenger
items.title_zh: Macaroni——一个单文件的消息应用
items.summary_en: A compact, self-contained messenger implemented as a single HTML file, showcasing how to bundle UI, logic, and data into one portable artifact. It's a minimalist take on a chat app designed for easy distribution and offline use.
items.summary_zh: 一个紧凑且自包容的消息应用，用单一 HTML 文件实现，展示了如何把界面、逻辑和数据打包成一个便携的产物。体现了便于分发与离线使用的极简聊天应用思路。

items.title_en: Spoiling Linux Kernel with "sanctioned" code
items.title_zh: Spoiling Linux Kernel：所谓的“被批准”代码
items.summary_en: A discussion about injecting 'sanctioned' code into the Linux kernel, raising questions about governance, community norms, and security.
items.summary_zh: 关于在 Linux 内核中注入“被批准”的代码的讨论，提出治理、社区规范与安全性方面的问题。

items.title_en: OpenCV 5 Is Here: The Biggest Leap in Years for Computer Vision
items.title_zh: OpenCV 5 来临：多年来计算机视觉的最大跃迁
items.summary_en: OpenCV 5 arrives with a major leap for computer vision, including API overhauls, performance gains, and expanded hardware and back-end support. It signals a more streamlined path to building, deploying, and optimizing CV apps.
items.summary_zh: OpenCV 5 发布带来计算机视觉领域的重大跃迁，包含 API 大改、性能提升以及对新硬件和后端的扩展支持。此举为构建、部署与优化计算机视觉应用提供更简便的路径。

items.title_en: Doing nothing at work
items.title_zh: 在工作中什么都不做
items.summary_en: Explores the value and risks of deliberate idleness at work, including how it impacts creativity, focus, and productivity.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在工作中有意“什么都不做”的价值与风险，以及对创造力、专注力和生产力的影响。

items.title_en: L'Affaire Siloxane
items.title_zh: Siloxane 事件
items.summary_en: This piece offers a concise examination of the Siloxane affair, highlighting its implications for tech policy, ethics, and governance.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Siloxane 事件的简要分析，聚焦其对科技治理、伦理与政策的影响。

items.title_en: Developer gets Half-Life running at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95
items.title_zh: 开发者在诺基亚 N95 上让 Half-Life 以 30 FPS 运行
items.summary_en: A developer makes Half-Life run at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95, a vivid demonstration of retro hardware porting and optimization. The feat highlights how constraints can inspire clever engineering.
items.summary_zh: 开发者让《半条命》在诺基亚 N95 上以约 30 FPS 运行，生动展示了对老设备的端口与优化。此成就体现了约束如何激发巧妙的工程实现。

items.title_en: Oh good, screwworms are back (2025)
items.title_zh: 哦，好消息，蠕螬虫又回来了（2025）
items.summary_en: Screwworm outbreaks reappear in 2025, highlighting ongoing pest control and biosecurity challenges.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年蠕螬虫再次出现，凸显持续的病虫害防控与生物安全挑战。

items.title_en: Ear Training Practice
items.title_zh: 耳朵训练练习
items.summary_en: Tone Dear curates structured ear-training drills to improve pitch recognition, interval sense, and rhythm. The exercises help musicians build a reliable internal reference and speed up practice, sight-singing, and improvisation. A practical resource for students and hobbyists alike.
items.summary_zh: Tone Dear 收集了结构化的耳朵训练练习，提升音高辨识、音程感知和节奏感。练习有助于建立稳定的内部音高参考，提升视唱与即兴表现的速度。对学生与业余爱好者都是实用的工具。

items.title_en: Smudging the game disc to make speedrunning 'SpongeBob' faster
items.title_zh: 通过抹污游戏光盘让《海绵宝宝》速通更快
items.summary_en: The piece documents a hardware-based trick to speedrun SpongeBob by smudging a game disc; it discusses feasibility, reproducibility, and ethics of hardware exploits in speedrunning.
items.summary_zh: 文章记录通过抹污光盘以提升《海绵宝宝》速通速度的做法，讨论其可行性、可重复性以及在速通领域的道德边界。

items.title_en: Reviving Papers with Code
items.title_zh: Papers with Code 重新上线
items.summary_en: Papers with Code is being revived, reestablishing a link between research papers and open-source implementations. The revival could help researchers verify results and reuse code more easily, reinforcing reproducibility in AI and ML.
items.summary_zh: Papers with Code 正在重新上线，重新建立论文与开源实现之间的联系。这一举措将帮助研究者更易验证结果、复用代码，提升 AI/ML 研究的可复现实验性。

items.title_en: CSS: Unavoidable Bad Parts
items.title_zh: CSS 的不可避免的坏部分
items.summary_en: CSS has endemic 'bad parts' that designers must learn to work around, from selector specificity to layout quirks. The post argues these design flaws are not mistakes but systemic constraints that require clever patterns and mental models.
items.summary_zh: CSS 存在天生的‘坏部分’，比如选择器的特异性和布局怪癖，往往需要设计者去绕行。文中认为这些缺陷不是错误，而是系统性约束，需要通过巧妙的模式与思维模型来应对。

items.title_en: Build a Basic AI Agent from Scratch: Long Task Planning
items.title_zh: 从零开始构建一个基本的 AI 代理：长任务规划
items.summary_en: An approachable, hands-on guide to building a simple AI agent from scratch, with a focus on long-horizon task planning and goal decomposition. It presents practical patterns for structuring planners, managing state, and handling multi-step tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一本易于上手的实操指南，讲解如何从零开始构建一个简单的 AI 代理，聚焦于长时任务规划与目标分解。文中给出在规划器结构、状态管理以及多步任务处理方面的实用模式。

items.title_en: Who's the smartest corvid?
items.title_zh: 谁是最聪明的乌鸦科动物？
items.summary_en: The piece surveys corvid intelligence, arguing certain crow species exhibit impressive problem-solving and tool-use abilities, challenging common assumptions about animal cognition.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理乌鸦科动物的智力，指出某些乌鸦具有出色的问题解决与工具使用能力，挑战对动物认知的常见看法。

items.title_en: Buy a train, bridge or tracks from the Swiss Railway
items.title_zh: 从瑞士铁路买火车、桥梁或轨道
items.summary_en: SBB resale program lets buyers purchase former trains, bridges, or tracks from Swiss Railways; unusual heritage or infrastructure projects may emerge.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士铁路推出资产再销售计划，出售包括列车、桥梁与轨道等历史资产，面向个人或机构买家，适合开展独特的硬件或基础设施项目，但需注意合规与安全。

items.title_en: Starfish by Peter Watts (1999)
items.title_zh: 彼得·沃茨的《海星》（1999）
items.summary_en: Peter Watts's Starfish (1999) offers a hard-SF exploration of biotech, consciousness, and post-human ethics. The story probes how enhancement tech and cognition intersect under extreme conditions, prompting reflection on future tech and humanity.
items.summary_zh: 彼得·沃茨的《海星》（1999）以硬科幻笔触探讨生物技术、意识和后人类伦理；在极端情境下，描绘了增强技术与认知的交汇，引发对未来科技与人性的思考。

items.title_en: Linux latency measurements and compositor tuning
items.title_zh: Linux 延迟测量与合成器调优
items.summary_en: Practical guidance for measuring Linux latency and tuning the Wayland/X compositor to reduce input lag. It covers profiling render paths, frame timing, and adjustments to vsync, buffering, and scheduling to tighten the loop.
items.summary_zh: 提供在 Linux 上测量延迟以及针对 Wayland/X 合成器的调优方法，以降低输入延迟。文章涵盖渲染路径分析、帧时序、vsync、缓冲与调度等要点，帮助提升交互流畅度。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claw Patrol, a security firewall for agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Claw Patrol——代理的安全防火墙
items.summary_en: Claw Patrol provides a security firewall for agents, enforcing policies and containment in AI agent workflows. It offers practical guardrail enforcement for autonomous systems.
items.summary_zh: Claw Patrol 提供面向代理的安全防火墙，在 AI 代理工作流中执行策略与隔离，展示对自主系统的实际边界管控能力。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Favorite text heavy blogs that are a joy to read?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你最喜欢的文字密集型博客有哪些？
items.summary_en: Readers share favorites of text-heavy blogs that are a joy to read, offering long-form insights and deep dives.
items.summary_zh: 读者分享最喜欢的文字密集型博客，提供长篇深度分析和丰富的洞见。

items.title_en: Vacuum-Form Signage
items.title_zh: 真空成型标牌的历史
items.summary_en: Vacuum-formed signage shaped the aesthetics and production of modern wayfinding and storefront displays. The piece traces its technique, tooling, and economic implications, showing how material choices influence urban signage.
items.summary_zh: 真空成型标牌塑造了现代导视与橱窗展示的美学与生产方式。文章追踪了其工艺、工具与经济影响，揭示材料选择如何左右城市标牌的形态与成本。

items.title_en: Who Runs Your Rust Future? Hands-On Intro to Async Rust
items.title_zh: 谁在掌控你的 Rust 未来？Async Rust 入门实战
items.summary_en: A practical, hands-on guide to async Rust, covering futures, await, and concurrency patterns. It helps developers write scalable, efficient Rust code beyond theory.
items.summary_zh: 一本面向初学者的 Async Rust 实战指南，讲解 futures、async/await 和并发模式，帮助开发者写出可扩展、性能更优的 Rust 代码。

items.title_en: World Capitals Voronoi
items.title_zh: 世界首都的 Voronoi 图
items.summary_en: Voronoi diagrams partition the world into regions around each capital, illustrating geographic proximity without relying on borders. The visualization makes patterns in global capital placement, highlighting cluster regions and spacing between major hubs.
items.summary_zh: 该作品用 Voronoi 图把世界各首都分区展示出来，每个首都成为一个区域的中心点，边界由最近的首都决定。图像揭示全球首都的分布规律和区域聚集趋势，便于理解地理接近度与影响力。

items.title_en: How Terry Tao became an evangelist for AI in math
items.title_zh: 田立 Tao 如何成为 AI 在数学中的倡导者
items.summary_en: Terence Tao has become an evangelist for applying AI in mathematics, exploring how AI can assist proof search, conjecture generation, and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 特里斯·陶教授已成为在数学领域推广 AI 的倡导者，探讨 AI 如何帮助证明搜索、猜想生成与协作。

items.title_en: Klondike Solitaire game for curses in 5k of C
items.title_zh: 用 curses 实现的 Klondike 纸牌游戏仅 5KB 的 C 代码
items.summary_en: A Klondike solitaire implementation in a mere 5 kilobytes of C using curses demonstrates extreme code golf craft. The tiny program packs gameplay, input handling, and rendering into a compact, portable retro-style puzzle.
items.summary_zh: 一个用 curses 实现的 Klondike 纸牌游戏仅用 5KB 的 C 代码，展示了极致代码高尔夫的技艺。这个极小的程序把玩法、输入处理与渲染紧凑地打包在一个可移植的复古风格小型程序里。

items.title_en: SVG-Line: Better Status Bars for Emacs – Charlie Holland's Blog
items.title_zh: SVG-Line：为 Emacs 提供更好状态栏
items.summary_en: SVG-Line adds vector-based status bars to Emacs, delivering a crisp, customizable UI win for power users.
items.summary_zh: SVG-Line 为 Emacs 增添矢量化状态栏，为高级用户带来更清晰、可定制的界面提升。

items.title_en: How we made hit video game Prince of Persia
items.title_zh: 我们是如何做出《Prince of Persia》这款热卖游戏
items.summary_en: The Guardian piece recounts the development of Prince of Persia, highlighting pioneering animation techniques like rotoscoping and iterative design under hardware constraints. It also touches on the game's enduring influence on action-adventure design and cinematic storytelling in games.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾《波斯王子》的开发过程，揭示了如光绘运动捕捉等开创性动画技法，以及在硬件限制下的迭代设计。并探讨这款游戏对动作冒险与游戏叙事风格的长期影响。

items.title_en: Programming a GBA Game on an iPhone
items.title_zh: 在 iPhone 上开发 GBA 游戏
items.summary_en: The post documents a workflow for building a Game Boy Advance game on an iPhone, including tooling, cross-compilation, and performance considerations. It demonstrates what's possible when mobile devices host retro-game development pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 文章记录了在 iPhone 上开发 GBA 游戏的工作流，涵盖工具链、跨编译与性能考量。展示了在移动设备上承载复古游戏开发流程的可行性。

items.title_en: Reverse engineering the Creative Katana soundbar to control it from Linux
items.title_zh: 在 Linux 下对 Creative Katana 音响条进行逆向工程以实现控制
items.summary_en: A hands-on account of reverse-engineering a Creative Katana soundbar to gain Linux control, including protocol discovery and driver considerations. It shows how open hardware and community tooling enable custom control beyond what official apps provide.
items.summary_zh: 以动手实践的方式对 Creative Katana 音响条进行逆向工程，以在 Linux 上实现控制，包括协议发现与驱动考虑。展示了开放硬件与社区工具如何实现官方应用之外的自定义控制。

items.title_en: A new era for software testing
items.title_zh: 软件测试的新时代
items.summary_en: A new era for software testing emphasizes automated verification, property-based testing, and continuous quality assurance in modern pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 软件测试进入新时代，强调自动化验证、基于属性的测试以及在现代开发管线中的持续质量确保。

items.title_en: Discovery of Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers in a German hangar
items.title_zh: 在德国机库发现冷战时期稀有的东欧计算机
items.summary_en: Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers found in a German hangar, shedding light on computing history and hardware preservation.
items.summary_zh: 在德国一个机库里发现冷战时期罕见的东方集团计算机，为计算历史与硬件保护提供罕见线索。

items.title_en: Queues Don't Fix Overload (2014)
items.title_zh: 队列并不能解决超载（2014）
items.summary_en: Ferd's essay argues queues don't solve overload and that system design must address root causes rather than relying on buffering.
items.summary_zh: Ferd 的论文指出队列并不能解决系统超载问题，设计应聚焦根本原因而非单纯缓冲。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How are thinking efforts implemented?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：思考努力是如何实现的？
items.summary_en: A discussion about how thinking and problem-solving processes are implemented in teams or AI-assisted workflows, inviting practical insights.
items.summary_zh: 关于在团队或 AI 辅助工作流中，思考与问题解决过程如何实现的讨论，欢迎给出实用经验。
